stemHtml: How should a wind of 160 degrees at 18 knots gusting to 30 knots be reported in radiotelephony?

options.a: Wind one hundred and sixty degrees eighteen knots gusting to thirty knots.
options.b: Wind from hundred and sixty at eighteen knots gusting to thirty knots.
options.c: Wind one six zero degrees one eight knots gusting three zero knots.
options.d: Wind one six zero degrees eighteen knots gusting three zero knots.
